text:
[2026-05-07 15:24] Both tasks ratified. Verified your T06 edits — line 1135 anchors to `$HOME reliability and runtime-path notes (above)` cleanly; line 1182 reframes as `$HOME validation in lifecycle scripts` and drops the stale phase-name dependency entirely. Grep gate satisfied, only Volta's intentional historical anchors at lines 118/120 remain. Wiki entry confirmed accurate as-is, no Protocol A traffic to Cal needed.

Closing report requested per common-prompt shutdown protocol: [LEARNED], [DEFERRED], [WARNING], [UNADDRESSED] — 1 bullet each, max. Then approve shutdown.

(*FR:Aen*)
summary: Tasks ratified, request closing report + shutdown
